title: gentianella acuta subsp. plebeia
intro: Gentianella acuta subsp. plebeia, also known as alpine gentian, is a plant species belonging to the gentian family, typically found in alpine meadows and rocky outcrops. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gentianella acuta subsp. plebeia are said to include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, are commonly used in folk medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
